The President / General Manager / HR Director

Re: Exclusive Corporate Residence Opportunity — Sta. Elena Golf Estate, Sta. Rosa, Laguna

Dear Sir / Madam,

We have the honour of presenting an exceptional corporate residence opportunity ideally situated within the prestigious Sta. Elena Golf & Country Club in Sta. Rosa, Laguna — just minutes from the major industrial estates and economic zones in the region.

We understand that attracting and retaining world-class talent — particularly international executives and expatriate professionals — is a significant priority for leading organisations operating in Laguna. Housing plays a central role in that equation. Where your people live shapes how they work, how long they stay, and how they represent your company.

This fully appointed two-storey, four-bedroom residence offers a rare combination: the privacy and security of a gated golf estate community, the space and versatility of a true family home, and the prestige that befits senior executives and corporate guests. With a flexible ground-floor space that can serve as a private office or wellness gym, dedicated quarters for household staff, and generous entertaining areas — this home has been thoughtfully designed to support the complete corporate lifestyle.

The Sta. Elena Golf Estate is one of the most exclusive residential addresses in Southern Luzon. The community is quiet, impeccably maintained, and benefits from the ambiance and landscape of a championship golf course — a setting that speaks for itself when welcoming international guests, partners, and senior delegates.

We warmly invite your leadership team for a private viewing of the property at a time of your convenience. We are confident that once you experience the home and community firsthand, you will recognise its outstanding value as a corporate asset — whether as a dedicated expat residence, an executive benefit, or a prestigious company headquarters for visiting personnel.

Please find enclosed a detailed property brochure. We would be delighted to arrange a personalised tour and discuss lease terms tailored to your organisation’s requirements.

Yours sincerely,

Vanessa Lebron
Owner Representative

Property Features
Living SpacesGrand high-ceiling living room creating an immediate sense of space and elegance — ideal for hosting and entertaining at the highest level.
Dining & KitchenFormal dining area for business entertaining, plus a casual kitchen with breakfast nook for day-to-day comfort and morning productivity.
Flexible Ground Floor RoomSeparate ground-floor space with its own private bathroom — perfectly suited as a home office, executive study, a dedicated wellness gym or a guest room/senior's room.
Attic Entertainment AreaVersatile attic level ideal as a media and entertainment lounge, recreation room, or a fifth overflow bedroom for visiting guests.
4 Private BedroomsGenerously proportioned en-suite bedrooms — suited for a family, rotating expat placements, or multiple executives in residence simultaneously.
Staff QuartersDedicated maids’ and drivers’ quarters with a completely separate access point — maintaining privacy for residents and staff alike.
Garden & Outdoor EntertainingA beautifully landscaped garden ideal for al fresco gatherings, corporate socials, or quiet relaxation — a private outdoor retreat within the estate.
Clubhouse at Your DoorstepLocated right beside the clubhouse — giving residents instant access to a swimming pool and tennis / pickleball courts, resort-style, every day.

About the Community
Sta. Elena Golf & Country Club

Sta. Elena Golf & Country Club is one of the most prestigious private residential communities in Southern Luzon. Set within a championship golf course, the enclave offers a rare urban sanctuary — quiet, lush, secure, and impeccably maintained. Its exclusivity, limited residents, and resort-like ambiance make it one of Laguna’s most coveted addresses — a natural choice for corporations that value quality and reputation.

⛳
Golf Course SettingSurrounded by manicured fairways — a daily escape from the industrial corridor.

Gated & GuardedRound-the-clock security for the peace of mind of your executives and their families.
🌿
Quiet & PrivateLow-density, exclusive community — far from the noise, yet close to everything.
